utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final solution, items present: selected_property (maps to property), financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget, plus an extra additional_services. Now check completeness: 
- property: required “selected property with details and price”. Present: selected_property with option, price, details. This satisfies price and details; although key is named selected_property instead of property, it is fully specified. Count as covered.
- financing: required “financing solution with terms”. Present: method, LTV, arrangement_fee, terms (though generic). It exists; count as covered.
- legal_services: required “legal services with costs”. Present: package, cost, details. Covered.
- moving_services: required “moving arrangements with costs”. Present: option, cost, details. Covered.
- setup_services: required “utility and setup services”. Present: utilities_package, cost, details. Covered.
- total_budget: required “complete cost breakdown”. Present with line items and total. Covered.
All 6 requested items are included and have the needed details.
